flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Davis Technical College rose 68% between 2006 and 2009 (32.4% → 54.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Davis Technical College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 3.0k).
